{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20845_1
|class_id=20845
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=collection@20845_2
|fame=12
|art=15
|fth=18
|civ=13
|tech=32
|ss1=Snail RUSH +20<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +2<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss2=Snail RUSH +40<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +4<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss3=Snail RUSH +60<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +6<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss4=Snail RUSH +60<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +6<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss7=Snail RUSH +60<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +6<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
